reviews.comment:
Ubicado en un lugar muy lindo, rodeado de los árboles, con buenas gentes para la mayor informacion. Se puede ver que están manteniendo muy bien todos, uno de los 1ros cabañas q recomiendo!!! Bastante amplio el lugar y limpio!

(Translated by Google)
Located in a beautiful spot, surrounded by trees, with friendly people who are always happy to help. You can see they're very well maintained; it's one of the first cabins I've recommended! The place is quite spacious and clean!

reviews.comment:
Un servicio de primera! La atención, el tiempo que te dedican como persona y al auto. El playero muy dispuesto. Me orientó y recomendó un lugar hermoso para pasar un día tranquilo con mi familia. Da gusto ser del aca. Los Felicito!!

(Translated by Google)
Top-notch service! The attention, the time they dedicate to you as a person and to your car. The attendant was very helpful. He gave me directions and recommended a beautiful place to spend a relaxing day with my family. It's great to be from here. Congratulations!!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13749144040617922376/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNnd3NxckZ3EAE
